hero.hero_overview: "Zhask is a powerful mage specializing in lane pressure and team fight control. His Nightmaric Spawn allows him to dominate lanes and zone enemies. He excels at pushing and dealing consistent magic damage from a safe distance."
hero.hero_strength:
Strong lane control with Nightmaric Spawn.

High DPS in team fights with his ultimate.

Can push turrets quickly and pressure enemies.

Great at zoning opponents and forcing them out of lane.
hero.hero_weakness:
Very squishy and easy to burst down.

Relies heavily on positioning to deal damage safely.

Struggles against assassins and high-mobility heroes.

Weak in the early game if his spawn is destroyed quickly.

counters.counter_desc:
Eudora can easily burst down Zhask with her deadly skill combo, effectively stopping him from using his ultimate.
Stun him first with Ball Lightning then cast Thunders Wrath and Forked Lightning to finish him off.
Use Hero Lock Mode or Skill Smart Targeting to make sure you use the combo on him and not on his summon.

Helcurt is a nightmare for squishy heroes, like Zhask. He has a blink ability with an innate silence effect, and a quick burst damage in his arsenal.
Before ganking him, stack Deadly Stinger fully on minions or jungle creeps.
Cast Dark Night Falls then close in and silence him with Shadow Transition to prevent him from using his ultimate. Use Deadly Stinger to slay him.

Akai counters Zhask by reducing the effectiveness of his ultimate.
As soon as he casts Dominators Descent, activate Heavy Spin to pin him onto a wall so he wont be able to use basic attacks. You can also push him near your turret or allies.
If he tries to escape, chase him with Headbutt and slow him down with Body Slam. Build Radiant Armor to effectively absorb his magic DPS.

dominants.dominant_desc: During the laning phase, strategically plant Nightmaric Spawns behind the enemy minion wave to hinder the opposing laner from farming gold and experience. If they approach too closely, utilize Mind Eater to inflict substantial damage.

Upon reaching level four and with the Turtle on your side of the lane, use Dominators Descent to assist the jungler in securing the Lord.

By this point, you should have amassed enough gold for your first core item.
Once you have obtained your initial core item, summon a Nightmaric Spawn near the enemy and cast Mind Eater to stun them.

Capitalize on the stun by activating Dominators Descent and utilizing Hive Clones to slow the target, allowing the spawn to unleash its death ray for maximum damage.

In the event of a losing team fight, you can utilize your ultimate to escape by summoning a Nightmaric Spawn away from the fray, activating Dominators Descent, blinking away, and dismounting immediately to retreat from the fight.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Since all of Zhasks skills scale with magic damage, opting for the Mage Emblem is the optimal choice. This emblem provides a boost to his magic power, cooldown reduction, and magic penetration.

As for core talents, Impure Rage is the preferred option as it increases damage dealt by his skills and restores mana upon hitting enemies.
This amplifies his damage output during the laning phase until he acquires one or two of his core items.

equips.equip_desc:
Zhask and his Nightmaric Spawn excel with magic damage, making magic items the optimal choice.

Begin with Glowing Wand. This provides a burn effect that synergizes with Zhasks multi-hit abilities, ensuring continuous damage over time.

Follow this with the Divine Glaive which enhances your magical penetration, allowing your abilities to shred through enemy defenses.

The Genius Wand further boosts this by reducing the targets magic defense with each hit, amplifying your overall damage potential.

Going to the late game, purchase Holy Crystal and Starlium Scythe. The Holy Crystal is key for significantly boosting Zhasks magic power, making your skills more lethal.

Meanwhile, the Starlium Scythe not only adds more Magic Power but also enhances your survivability with the extra Lifesteal.

hero.hero_overview:
Zhask in Mobile Legends whose slot skills are 4 and the four skills are separate. Zhask has the magical power to call the insect-shaped creatures from his magic wand and make them into weapons and attacks from Zhask. This skill can attack even a mine for the opponent and have great damage.

His suitable line is the mid and his abilities help him farming quickly and go to help the rest of the team.
hero.hero_strength:
Great pusher.
Fast at pushing turret.
Great crowd control abilities.
Can deal true damage.
High attack speed with burst damage.

Zhask fires a penetrating mental missile in the designated direction, Nightmaric Spawn will attack enemies by Mind Eater and stun.

Zhask can summon creatures to attack enemies and transform to become stronger in combat. Zhask can use items that increase attack speed, push turrets quickly, and deal true damage.
hero.hero_weakness:
Squishy hero.
Weak against CC.
Weak against burst damage.

Get in close and destroy Zhask with explosive damage. Zhask is quite weak in the early game, ganking early is the most effective way to counter Zhask.

data.recommend: If you want to understand how to use or counter Zhask, you should read this guide.

spell.spell_desc:
Flicker is the safest choice for a battle spell since Zhasks only mobility skill is his ultimate, Dominators Descent, which has a lengthy cooldown. This spell enables better setup and positioning with his ultimate.

For those confident in their skills, Inspire can be a viable alternative.

equips.equip_desc: This build are used for war if the enemies have many thick hero such as Tank and any other regen hero. The key item is Glowing Wand anf Genius Wand to penetration enemies shield and regeneration.
This build are used for war if the enemies didn't have tank hero like gatot, hylos, tigreal, etc. the key item is divine glaive and blood wings to help give highest damege to enemies.

This build are used for war if the enemies are high damage hero but their HP are slim such as Karina, Saber, etc. The key item are concentrated Energy and Enchanted Talisman to maintain mana and HP so the damage that enemy deals not fatal to us..
